description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly white and green color scheme accented by black components. The receiver and stock are white, with green highlights and a prominent leaf motif on the magazine and receiver, suggesting a custom or themed finish. The handguard is black with green accents and appears to have a ribbed, grippy texture for improved handling. The magazine is detachable and curved, with a green leaf pattern, and the stock is skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear support. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a muzzle brake at the end of the barrel, both in green, enhancing its visual appeal and functionality. The overall build suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of modern assault rifles.
description: A white, green, and black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, ribbed handguard, detachable curved magazine, and green leaf motifs.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing the circular muzzle brake and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the white receiver, green and black ribbed handguard, skeletonized stock, and the green leaf motif on the magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the open, skeletonized stock and the alignment of the rifle's body, with green accents visible on the stock.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the white and green receiver, black handguard, and the detailed green leaf motif on the magazine.
